changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO risk_model_domains (id, risk_domain_id, risk_model_id, created_by_id, risk_management_owner_id) VALUES (101, 101, 101, 150, 161) , (102, 102, 101, 150, 161) , (103, 103, 101, 150, 161) , (104, 104, 101, 150, 161) , (105, 105, 101, 150, 161) , (106, 106, 101, 150, 161) , (107, 107, 101, 150, 161) ;
ALTER SEQUENCE risk_model_domains_id_seq RESTART WITH 108;
